name: Broom of Flying
overview: A wooden broom that can be ridden through the air at high speed.

properties.activation: Take a Magic action to make it hover beneath you while you stand astride it
properties.capacity: Can carry up to 400 pounds, but Fly Speed becomes 30 feet while carrying over 200 pounds
properties.landing: The broom stops hovering when you land or when you're no longer riding it

autonomous_travel.description: As a Magic action, you can send the broom to travel alone to a destination within 1 mile of you if you name the location and are familiar with it.
autonomous_travel.return: The broom comes back to you when you take a Magic action and use a command word if the broom is still within 1 mile of you.
